params.name: --bare
params.description: Skip hooks/LSP sync for zero-overhead CI
params.use_case: CI/CD environments where fast startup is critical
params.impact: Reduces Claude Code startup time from ~3s to <500ms

params.name: --channels
params.impact: Enables Claude Code Channels for mobile access

params.name: --effort
params.impact: Affects model selection and token budget

params.name: --model
params.impact: Allows switching between claude-opus, claude-sonnet, etc.
